phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mudejar ceiling is located
phrases.cultural_note: The 16th-century wooden ceiling features intricate geometric patterns typical of Mudejar art, positioned above the main nave.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na nave central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the main nave.

responses.english: Good morning, it is in the main nave.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH NAH-vih sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica na nave central.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do Museu da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO DUH SEH?

likely_response.local: Siga placas para bilheteira do Museu da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow signs to the ticket office of the Sé Museum.

responses.english: Follow signs to the ticket office of the Sé Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO DUH SEH.
responses.french: Siga placas para bilheteira do Museu da Sé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mudejar ceiling is located
phrases.cultural_note: The Mudejar ceiling is a prominent feature inside the cathedral, located above the nave.
